description:
A national solar installer is evaluating which US markets offer the best solar energy potential. They want a data-driven comparison of identical residential PV systems across different climate regions.

Simulate a 10 kW fixed south-facing system with 30-degree tilt in each of these three cities:
- Phoenix, Arizona
- Tucson, Arizona
- Des Moines, Iowa

Use the same system parameters for all three locations so the comparison is fair. Use real weather data from the SAM installation and NREL's solar modeling tools.

For each city, record the annual energy production. Determine which city produces the most and least energy.

Save the complete comparison as JSON at:
/home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/PV_Location_Comparison.json

The output should include per-city results with city name and annual energy, plus identification of the best and worst performing locations.
